title: Thorium Power
description:
A power mod focused on the chemical element Thorium.
So far there is thorium ore, ingots, and what comes with them, and 1 type of reactor. With more planned in the future, like molten salt reactors or pellet reactors.
body:
Power mod focusing on Thorium

So far there is thorium ore, ingots, and what comes with them, and 1 type of reactor. With more planned in the future, like molten salt reactors or pellet reactors.

Thorium is a radioactive element that is currently being explored as an alternative to uranium and plutonium in reactors in real life, as it promises to be far safer. I have decided to make a power producing mod based on this element.
